common.sqliteUnavailable: SQLite is not available on this platform.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure appearance and database tools for the invoice workspace. Scanning uses the AI extraction API only.
settings.aiExtractionBody: Invoice scans are sent to the OpenAI-compatible chat completions API configured in the app. Endpoint {{endpoint}}, model {{model}}. No separate OCR server is used.
settings.databaseDescription: Review storage, export history, and Excel tools.
settings.googleSheetsDescription: Authorize your Google account and configure the target spreadsheet for invoice row sync.
settings.googleChooseSheetSignInFirst: Sign in with Google before choosing or creating a Google Sheet.
settings.googleSheetPickerHint: Choose an existing spreadsheet or create a new one. The app writes to the Trang tính1 tab and auto-detects the 4 required headers on row 1.
settings.googleSheetPickerSelectFailed: Unable to select this Google Sheet.
settings.googleSheetPickerCreateFailed: Unable to create a new Google Sheet.
settings.googleSheetPickerEmpty: No Google Sheets were found for this account.
settings.googleAuthRequiredMessage: Sign in with Google before testing the spreadsheet connection.
settings.googleSpreadsheetRequiredMessage: Enter the Spreadsheet ID in Settings before testing.
settings.googleConnectionFailedMessage: Unable to connect to the configured spreadsheet.
settings.googleSheetTabMissingMessage: The tab "{{tabName}}" does not exist in the configured spreadsheet.
settings.googleMissingIosClientId: Google iOS client ID is not configured.
settings.googleSignInInProgress: Google sign-in is already in progress.
settings.googlePlayServicesUnavailable: Google Play Services is unavailable or out of date on this device. Use an Android device with Play Store support, or recreate the emulator with a Google Play image.
settings.googleDeveloperError: The Android OAuth client may have the wrong package name or SHA-1. Check your Google Cloud Console configuration.
settings.googleSignInMissingAccessToken: Google sign-in did not return an access token.
settings.googleSignInMissingUser: Google sign-in did not return a user.
settings.googleSessionExpired: Your Google session has expired. Please sign in again.
settings.googleWebUnsupported: Google Sheets sign-in is supported only in native Android/iOS development builds right now. Web support needs a separate OAuth web flow.
settings.googleApiSessionExpired: Your Google session has expired. Please sign in again.
settings.googleApiMissingScopes: The app does not have the required Google Sheets/Drive permissions, or the API is not enabled.
settings.googleApiNotFound: The Google Sheet was not found, or the current account does not have access to it.
settings.googleApiNetworkFailed: Unable to reach the Google API. Check your network connection and try again.
settings.googleApiMissingSheetId: Google Sheets did not return a sheet ID for the Trang tính1 tab.
settings.googleApiMissingSpreadsheetId: Google Sheets did not return a spreadsheet ID.

home.exportHint: Export options are available in the Database Management screen.

database.title: Database management
database.subtitle: Review local storage metrics, export history, and Excel output activity.
database.recentExportsEmpty: Export activity will appear here after your first Excel export.
database.purgeHint: Deletes invoices not marked success/error (typically pending scans).
database.alertPurgeMessage: This will permanently remove invoices not marked as success or error (typically pending scans).

scan.cameraRequired: Camera access is required to scan invoices.
scan.cameraDisabled: Camera access is turned off for this app. Enable it in system settings, then try again.
scan.errorNoApiKey: OpenAI test API key is not configured.
scan.openAiEmptyResponse: The AI API returned an empty response.
scan.errorParseModelResponse:
Unable to parse the AI response as JSON:
{{response}}
scan.errorPhotoPermission: Photo library permission is required to choose an invoice image.
scan.errorCameraPermission: Camera permission is required to take an invoice photo.

invoice.pendingScanMissing: Pending scan data is missing. Please scan again.
invoice.reviewBeforeSaveHint: Confirm the AI result, then the app will save locally first and try syncing to Google Sheets.
invoice.structuredReviewHint: You can manually edit every field before saving or retry syncing to Google Sheets.
invoice.extractionSuccessHint: Structured fields came from the AI response. Review the raw model output below if you need to audit the result.
invoice.extractionLimitedHint: Raw model output was stored, but structured extraction is still limited for this invoice.
invoice.noRawText: No extraction text was stored for this invoice.
invoice.noLineItemsEditable: No line items yet. You can add them manually if needed.
invoice.alertDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoice.softWarningMessage: This invoice is still missing some important fields:
invoice.alertInvoiceNameRequiredMessage: Please enter an invoice name before confirming.
invoice.pushSheetModalHint: Review these values before appending a row to Google Sheets.
invoice.pushToSheetSuccessMessage: Invoice data was appended to Google Sheets.
invoice.pushToSheetFailedMessage: Unable to push the invoice row to Google Sheets.
invoice.alreadySyncedMessage: This invoice has already been synced to Google Sheets, so the app will not append it again.
invoice.pushToSheetAuthRequiredMessage: Go to Settings and sign in with Google first.
invoice.pushToSheetConfigRequiredMessage: Go to Settings and choose or create a Google Sheet before pushing rows.
invoice.localSavedSheetFailedTitle: Saved locally but not to Sheet
invoice.localSavedSheetFailedMessage:
The invoice was saved locally, but Google Sheets sync did not complete.

Details: {{message}}
invoice.localSavedSheetFailedFallback: Unable to sync to Google Sheets.

empty.noInvoicesDescription: Scan a paper invoice or import one from your gallery to start building your local invoice archive.
empty.noExportReadyDescription: Successful invoice scans will appear here when they are ready to export.

alerts.homeDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

export.documentDirectoryUnavailable: Document directory is not available on this device.
export.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
